data.description: Lifestyle expenses provide a way to account for the cost of living in the fantasy world. They cover accommodations, food, drink, and your necessities. Furthermore, they cover other costs maintaining equipment you might have when adventure calls. At start each or your period of week month choice, choose lifestyle the label pay from Expenses and the price sustain lifestyle. The listed prices are per day, ifyou lo the so wish calculate cosI chosen lifestyle a multiply the listed price over thirly-day period, by Your might 30. lifestyle change from one period to the next, on funds have your or might you maintain the same lifestyle your character's career.
